texto: Could it be that different political views, different religions and even scientific theories had been looking at our reality from different angles? If so, we should not accept or prefer one over the other, but instead we must aim to draw the best out of each view.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ardiana Bani Cohn que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “Could it be that different political views, different religions and even scientific theories had …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, inspirational-attitude, reflexao, com foco em inspiracao e reflexao.
